ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism from which the sample was derived */,
  "organism_part" TEXT /* Part of the organism from which the sample was derived */,
  "cell_line" TEXT /* Cell line associated with the sample */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the individual from which the sample was derived */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual from which the sample was derived */,
  "disease" TEXT /* Disease state of the individual from which the sample was derived */,
  "developmental_stage" TEXT /* Developmental stage of the sample */,
  "individual" TEXT /* Individual from which the sample was derived */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell associated with the sample */,
  "ancestry_category" TEXT /* Ancestry category of the individual from which the sample was derived */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material from which the sample was derived (e.g., cell, tissue) */,
  "sample_description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "sample_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the sample */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sample was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sample was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assays" (
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assay */,
  "assay_name" TEXT /* Name of the assay */,
  "assay_type" TEXT /* Type of assay (e.g., label-free, TMT, iTRAQ) */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used to perform the assay */,
  "fraction_identifier" INTEGER /* Identifier for the fraction of the sample used in the assay */,
  "technical_replicate" INTEGER /* Number of technical replicates for the assay */,
  "dissociation_method" TEXT /* Method used for dissociation */,
  "cleavage_agent_details" TEXT /* Details of the cleavage agent used */,
  "modification_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters for modifications made to the sample */,
  "precursor_mass_tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance for precursor mass */,
  "fragment_mass_tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance for fragment mass */,
  "assay_description" TEXT /* Description of the assay */,
  "assay_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the assay */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the assay was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the assay was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample associated with the data file */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assay associated with the data file */,
  "file_uri" TEXT /* URI of the data file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the file (e.g., raw, mzML) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the data file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_assays" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assay */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or note about the sample-assay pair */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sample-assay pair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sample-assay pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id", "assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the permission */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample associated with the permission */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Flag indicating read access */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Flag indicating write access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the export */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample associated with the export */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assay associated with the export */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the export (e.g., csv, excel, mzML) */,
  "export_uri" TEXT /* URI of the exported file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the export was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the export was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Query used for the search */,
  "search_results" TEXT /* Results of the search */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the search was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the search was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample associated with the annotation */,
  "annotation_key" TEXT /* Key for the annotation */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value for the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_annotations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
